name: Ayush Pandey
title: Postdoctoral Scholar
bio: I am a postdoctoral scholar at the Larson Transportation Institute at The Pennsylvania State University. My work sits at the intersection of transport economics, urban traffic modeling, and urban planning. I completed my PhD at UIUC in 2025 with a dissertation on 'Steady-state models and multiple equilibria in transportation.' I also hold an MS from UIUC (2020) and a Bachelor of Technology in Civil Engineering from IIT Bombay (2019). My research focuses on transport economics and policy, public transportation, congestion pricing, causal analysis, and novel data collection methods for urban mobility.
